## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between Daniel Lopes (growthx.ai) and Alex Shtin (events.workablemail.com) for a senior engineering role focused on Temporal-based AI workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/7_nGRjPxXrjus2W5FhwgMkMxPv4Yyq5A?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Growthx.ai has built an AI workflow engine on top of Temporal, generating $7M ARR in 11 months](https://fathom.video/share/7_nGRjPxXrjus2W5FhwgMkMxPv4Yyq5A?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)
  - [The company is scaling rapidly, aiming for $20M revenue by year-end, with plans to expand engineering team to 20 people](https://fathom.video/share/7_nGRjPxXrjus2W5FhwgMkMxPv4Yyq5A?tab=summary&timestamp=1616.0)
  - [Alex Shtin, with deep Temporal expertise, could be a valuable addition to help scale and enhance the AI workflow system](https://fathom.video/share/7_nGRjPxXrjus2W5FhwgMkMxPv4Yyq5A?tab=summary&timestamp=2158.0)
  - [Both parties expressed mutual interest, with next steps to continue discussions after Alex completes other ongoing interviews](https://fathom.video/share/7_nGRjPxXrjus2W5FhwgMkMxPv4Yyq5A?tab=summary&timestamp=2817.0)

## Topics

### Growthx.ai's Business Model and Technology Stack

  - [Built an AI workflow engine on top of Temporal for content marketing automation](https://fathom.video/share/7_nGRjPxXrjus2W5FhwgMkMxPv4Yyq5A?tab=summary&timestamp=1033.0)
  - [Generated $7M ARR in 11 months, recently raised $12M in funding](https://fathom.video/share/7_nGRjPxXrjus2W5FhwgMkMxPv4Yyq5A?tab=summary&timestamp=1609.0)
  - [Two-layered business: services (content marketing, potentially expanding to recruiting) and AI workflow platform](https://fathom.video/share/7_nGRjPxXrjus2W5FhwgMkMxPv4Yyq5A?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)
  - [Tech stack includes TypeScript, Temporal, and various AI models/APIs](https://fathom.video/share/7_nGRjPxXrjus2W5FhwgMkMxPv4Yyq5A?tab=summary&timestamp=872.0)
  - [Developed UI for workflow creation, execution, and monitoring](https://fathom.video/share/7_nGRjPxXrjus2W5FhwgMkMxPv4Yyq5A?tab=summary&timestamp=1122.0)

### Alex Shtin's Background and Expertise

  - [Core contributor to Temporal, working on low-level server-side components](https://fathom.video/share/7_nGRjPxXrjus2W5FhwgMkMxPv4Yyq5A?tab=summary&timestamp=2158.0)
  - [Deep understanding of distributed systems and workflow engines](https://fathom.video/share/7_nGRjPxXrjus2W5FhwgMkMxPv4Yyq5A?tab=summary&timestamp=2158.0)
  - [Experience with Go programming language, though current role is primarily TypeScript-based](https://fathom.video/share/7_nGRjPxXrjus2W5FhwgMkMxPv4Yyq5A?tab=summary&timestamp=2175.0)

### Potential Collaboration Opportunities

  - [Growthx.ai needs expertise in scaling Temporal-based systems for broader user adoption](https://fathom.video/share/7_nGRjPxXrjus2W5FhwgMkMxPv4Yyq5A?tab=summary&timestamp=2201.0)
  - [Opportunities to enhance workflow creation, API client generation, and tracing capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/7_nGRjPxXrjus2W5FhwgMkMxPv4Yyq5A?tab=summary&timestamp=2520.0)
  - [Alex's deep Temporal knowledge could be valuable for optimizing and expanding the platform](https://fathom.video/share/7_nGRjPxXrjus2W5FhwgMkMxPv4Yyq5A?tab=summary&timestamp=2201.0)

### Company Culture and Growth Plans

  - [Focusing on hiring experienced engineers to lead entire projects](https://fathom.video/share/7_nGRjPxXrjus2W5FhwgMkMxPv4Yyq5A?tab=summary&timestamp=1641.0)
  - [Planning to grow engineering team from 8 to 20 by year-end](https://fathom.video/share/7_nGRjPxXrjus2W5FhwgMkMxPv4Yyq5A?tab=summary&timestamp=2613.0)
  - [Total company size expected to reach 100 people, including 60 in services](https://fathom.video/share/7_nGRjPxXrjus2W5FhwgMkMxPv4Yyq5A?tab=summary&timestamp=2616.0)

### Funding and Financial Position

  - [Recently raised Series A funding, company is currently profitable](https://fathom.video/share/7_nGRjPxXrjus2W5FhwgMkMxPv4Yyq5A?tab=summary&timestamp=1616.0)
  - [On track for $20M revenue by year-end, with potential for Series B in the future](https://fathom.video/share/7_nGRjPxXrjus2W5FhwgMkMxPv4Yyq5A?tab=summary&timestamp=3053.0)
  - [Attractive equity position for new hires due to controlled valuation and low dilution](https://fathom.video/share/7_nGRjPxXrjus2W5FhwgMkMxPv4Yyq5A?tab=summary&timestamp=3034.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Alex to complete ongoing interviews with other companies this week](https://fathom.video/share/7_nGRjPxXrjus2W5FhwgMkMxPv4Yyq5A?tab=summary&timestamp=2817.0)
  - [Potential follow-up discussion next week to explore the opportunity further](https://fathom.video/share/7_nGRjPxXrjus2W5FhwgMkMxPv4Yyq5A?tab=summary&timestamp=2880.0)
  - [Daniel open to sharing more details on roadmap and company plans if needed](https://fathom.video/share/7_nGRjPxXrjus2W5FhwgMkMxPv4Yyq5A?tab=summary&timestamp=3104.0)
  - [Both parties to consider how Alex's Temporal expertise could benefit Growthx.ai's scaling plans](https://fathom.video/share/7_nGRjPxXrjus2W5FhwgMkMxPv4Yyq5A?tab=summary&timestamp=2201.0)
